name: manager-conditional-ordering
description: Worker sequencing is enforced structurally via ConditionalRequirement(only_after=...), not by trusting the prompt: log_capturer only after flow_runner, and db_query_agent / bug_analyzer / sql_performance_agent / source_code_analyst only after log_capturer, because those four are handed 'the logs from step 2' which would otherwise not exist.
invariants: Docker Log Capturer must never be delegatable before the Flow Runner has run — its --since lookback window is a hedge for already-emitted output, not a substitute for real ordering
Any new worker that consumes captured logs must get its own ConditionalRequirement(only_after=handoffs['log_capturer'])
contracts: requirements= on the supervisor guarantees delegation order regardless of what the LLM tries to call
